  • Uses of BoardView in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board that implement BoardView
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Board
    The Mesos game board, containing the offer tiles (where players place their totems during the placing phase) and the default tiles (where players return at the end of each round to collect food).

  • Uses of BoardView in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building with parameters of type BoardView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PlusOneFoodOnReturnDefaultTile.setBoardView(BoardView boardView)
    Sets the board view used to determine whether the player is on an eligible tile.

  • Uses of BoardView in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Factory.Building

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Factory.Building with parameters of type BoardView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BuildingCard
    BuildingFactory.createBuildingById(int id, BoardView boardView)
    Creates a single BuildingCard with its effect bound, looked up by building ID.
    List<BuildingCard>
    BuildingFactory.createBuildingDeck(int playerNumber, BoardView boardView)
    Builds the building deck for the given player count, selecting the correct number of buildings per era and binding each to its effect.

  • Uses of BoardView in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Factory.Deck

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Factory.Deck with parameters of type BoardView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<BuildingCard>
    DeckFactory.loadBuildingDeck(List<Integer> buildingIds, BoardView boardView)
    Rebuilds a list of buildings from their IDs during game restore.

  • Uses of BoardView in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game

    Constructors in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game with parameters of type BoardView
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Market(GameView gameView, BoardView boardView)
    Initializes the market by building the deck and buildings for the given player count, then populates both the bottom and top card/building rows.
     
    TurnManager(BoardView boardView)
    Creates a TurnManager backed by the given board view.
